title: Fix Elder Shroomba boss: recovery vulnerability, death respawn, arena confinement

criteria.description: During the Elder Shroomba's vulnerable state, checkEnemyPlayerCollisions must NOT deal contact damage to the player when touching the boss. The boss entity must be skipped in enemy-player collision when boss.vulnerable === true.
criteria.verification: code-review + runtime: Player can stand next to boss during vulnerable window without taking damage

criteria.description: During the Elder Shroomba's vulnerable state, player attack collisions (melee, chargeAttack, jumpAttack) still deal damage to the boss via checkPlayerAttackCollisions. The existing vulnerability check (e.isBoss && !e.vulnerable) remains intact.
criteria.verification: code-review: attack collision path unchanged for vulnerable bosses

criteria.description: When the player dies during a boss fight (hp reaches 0, _die() fires), after the respawn delay the player respawns at the stage start (Level.spawnX, Level.spawnY) with full HP. The boss fight state is reset: arena entry wall is unsealed (col 65 ground-level rows restored to TILE_EMPTY), camera lock is released, and the boss is reset to its spawn position with full health.
criteria.verification: code-review + runtime: death during boss fight leads to full level reset of boss encounter

criteria.description: After respawning from a boss-fight death, the camera follows the player normally (not locked to arena), the player can walk through the level, and re-entering the boss arena re-triggers the boss fight sequence.
criteria.verification: runtime: camera tracks player after respawn, boss arena can be re-triggered

criteria.description: The Elder Shroomba boss X position is clamped within the boss arena bounds on every frame. The boss cannot move past the arena left wall (Level.bossArenaX + TILE_SIZE) or right wall. This prevents the boss from escaping through the entry gap.
criteria.verification: code-review: boss X clamped in _updateElderShroomba or _updateBoss

criteria.description: When the player is dead (Player.state === 'dead'), the boss stops tracking toward the player and does not initiate new attacks. The boss either idles or pauses its attack cycle.
criteria.verification: code-review: boss AI checks Player.state !== 'dead' before tracking/attacking

criteria.description: REGRESSION: Boss attack patterns still function — boss jumps, creates shockwaves on landing, and transitions through attacking/vulnerable states correctly.
REGRESSION: Boss can still be defeated — when boss health reaches 0, _onBossDefeated fires and the boss is removed. Boss health bar, phase transitions, and defeat sequence unchanged.
REGRESSION: Game loads and runs without JavaScript errors. index.html serves correctly and the game loop starts.
criteria.verification: runtime: page loads, no console errors on startup
